title: [SRPT]Scape and Run: Parasites The Twilight Forest
description: Adds parasitic variants of The Twilight Forest entities.
body:
Adds parasitic variants of The Twilight Forest entities.

Include Assimilateds, Ferals, Hijackeds, Crudes, Primitives, Adapteds

There will be more types of parasites. Like Inborns, Pures, And Even Deriveds
